## LibraryRuntime.LibraryRuntimeContext.getRuntimeProcedure() method

Gets a runtime procedure by its composite ID (with caching).

**Signature:**

```typescript
getRuntimeProcedure(id: ProcedureId): Result<Procedure>;
```
